body:
## Summary

- **Bundle integration**: merged all 186 files from `dealix_market_launch_complete_bundle` (docs, schemas, evals, reports, patches) into the correct repo locations — additive only, zero overwrites
- **4x expansion**: on top of the bundle, built a complete Python implementation layer, FastAPI router, 319-test suite, 10 CLI scripts, 9 additional YAML eval files, 15 JSON schemas, 5 sample data files, and 15 new content/strategy docs
- **319/319 tests passing** — `pytest tests/launch/ -v`

## What's inside

### Core Python module: `dealix/launch_os/`
| Module | What it does |
|--------|-------------|
| `icp_scorer.py` | 100-point ICP rubric; tiers A/B/C/DQ; `batch_score()`; doctests |
| `vertical_scorer.py` | 15 pre-scored Saudi sectors; `top_wedge()` → **automotive** |
| `trust_preflight.py` | 10-rule trust gate (R01–R10); blocks guarantee language, PII, spam, WhatsApp without consent |
| `outreach_factory.py` | Draft generation across email/LinkedIn/phone; auto-runs preflight |
| `proposal_engine.py` | `ProposalPack` builder; Arabic markdown renderer; offer-tier pricing |
| `pipeline_tracker.py` | JSONL-backed pipeline; full stage progression RESEARCH→WON/LOST |
| `founder_daily_command.py` | `DailyCommand` generator; bilingual brief renderer |

### API layer
- `api/routers/launch_os.py` — 14 FastAPI endpoints: ICP scoring, vertical selection, pipeline CRUD, trust preflight, daily command (JSON + markdown)
- `api/schemas/launch.py` — Pydantic v2 request/response models

### Scripts: `scripts/launch/` (10 dry-run CLI scripts)
```
make launch-validate          # validate all schemas + module imports
make launch-vertical-score    # ranked Saudi verticals table
make launch-icp-score         # score sample accounts
make launch-trust-preflight   # run trust gate on drafts
make launch-outreach-drafts   # generate email/LinkedIn/phone drafts
make launch-proposal          # render Arabic proposal to markdown
make launch-founder-command   # generate today's daily brief
make launch-weekly-review     # weekly GTM board review
make launch-content           # LinkedIn posts + video scripts + emails
make launch-all-dry-runs      # run all of the above in sequence
make test-launch              # pytest tests/launch/
```

### Docs added (64 new markdown files)
- `docs/strategy/` — market entry, positioning bible, competitor contrast, Saudi vertical matrix, wedge decision, real estate deep dive, automotive deep dive, Vision 2030 alignment
- `docs/offers/` — full 7-rung ladder, comparison table, decision guide, pricing policy, 7 per-offer cards
- `docs/sales/` — objection bible, discovery/demo/closing scripts, negotiation tactics, referral system, pipeline velocity, enterprise motion, founder-led playbook, outreach approval playbook
- `docs/proposal/` — 7 templates (AR + EN): proposal, proof pack, case study, before/after, ROI discussion, payment handoff
- `docs/content/` — 30-day LinkedIn calendar, video scripts, landing copy, one-pager, exec narrative, repurposing system, Arabic style guide, case study bank
- `docs/delivery/` — onboarding, first 14 days, value reporting, renewal, escalation, metrics library
- `docs/trust/` — approval matrix, no-overclaim policy, preflight rules, data handling, safe claims

### Evals: `evals/launch/` (9 YAML files, 65 cases)
ICP scoring, trust preflight, Arabic sales tone, claim safety, pipeline velocity, proposal quality, content quality, delivery quality, outreach quality, objection handling

### Sample data: `data/launch/`
- 5 realistic Saudi target accounts (real estate, automotive, contracting, clinic, F&B)
- 3 pipeline deals in different stages with realistic values
- 2 approved outreach drafts (LinkedIn + email)
- 1 full Arabic proposal for the WhatsApp OS offer

### Schemas: `schemas/launch/` (15 JSON Schema files)
icp_score, vertical_score, pipeline_item, target_account, trust_preflight, outreach_draft, proposal_pack, proof_pack, approval_item, buyer_persona, discovery_call, founder_daily_command, content_asset, sales_pipeline_item, launch_manifest

## Test plan
- [ ] `make launch-validate` → all schemas + modules green
- [ ] `make launch-vertical-score` → ranked table with automotive at top
- [ ] `make launch-all-dry-runs` → all 10 scripts complete without error
- [ ] `make test-launch` → 319/319 pass
- [ ] `make launch-icp-score` → 5 accounts scored and tiered correctly
- [ ] `make launch-founder-command` → bilingual brief rendered

https://claude.ai/code/session_01Qhq52b83C2AZBmb5StR8Zx

---
_Generated by [Claude Code](https://claude.ai/code/session_01Qhq52b83C2AZBmb5StR8Zx)_

…ntelligence OS

## Bundle Integration (186 files from dealix_market_launch_complete_bundle)
- docs/strategy/ — 8 Arabic strategy docs (market entry, positioning bible, competitor analysis, vertical matrix, wedge decision, 2 vertical deep dives, Vision 2030 alignment)
- docs/offers/ — 10 offer docs including full 7-rung ladder, comparison table, decision guide, pricing policy
- docs/targeting/ — 6 ICP + account targeting docs
- docs/sales/ — 13 sales playbooks (founder-led, objection bible, discovery/demo/closing scripts, negotiation, referral, pipeline velocity, enterprise motion)
- docs/proposal/ — 7 proposal + proof pack templates (AR + EN)
- docs/content/ — 9 content docs (30-day LinkedIn calendar, video scripts, landing copy, one-pager, exec narrative, repurposing system, Arabic style guide)
- docs/delivery/ — 6 delivery docs (onboarding, first 14 days, value reporting, renewal, escalation, metrics library)
- docs/trust/ — 5 trust docs (approval matrix, no-overclaim policy, preflight rules, data handling, safe claims library)
- schemas/launch/ — 15 JSON schemas (icp_score, vertical_score, pipeline_item, target_account, trust_preflight, outreach_draft, proposal_pack, proof_pack, approval_item, buyer_persona, discovery_call, founder_daily_command, content_asset, sales_pipeline_item, launch_manifest)
- evals/launch/ — 9 YAML eval files with 65 total test cases (ICP scoring, trust preflight, Arabic tone, claim safety, pipeline velocity, proposal quality, content quality, delivery quality, outreach quality, objection handling)
- reports/launch/ — 11 report templates (daily pipeline, outreach drafts, target review, pipeline review, offer performance, content-to-pipeline, client delivery health, approval queue, objection intelligence, weekly GTM board, market wedge decision)

## Core Python Module: dealix/launch_os/
- icp_scorer.py — 100-point ICP rubric; tiers A/B/C/DQ; batch_score; doctests
- vertical_scorer.py — 15 pre-scored Saudi sectors; top_wedge(); rank_verticals()
- trust_preflight.py — 10 rule trust gate; R01-R10 blocking/warn; Arabic + English violations
- outreach_factory.py — draft generation across email/linkedin/phone; preflight integration
- proposal_engine.py — ProposalPack builder; Arabic markdown renderer; offer-tier pricing
- pipeline_tracker.py — JSONL-backed sales pipeline; full stage progression; list_by_stage; summary
- founder_daily_command.py — DailyCommand generator; render_brief(); bilingual output

## API Layer
- api/routers/launch_os.py — FastAPI router: ICP scoring, vertical selection, pipeline CRUD, trust preflight, daily command (json + markdown); admin-key gated mutations
- api/schemas/launch.py — Pydantic v2 schemas for all launch OS endpoints

## Scripts: scripts/launch/ (10 standalone dry-run scripts)
- vertical_score_dry_run.py, icp_score_dry_run.py, trust_preflight_dry_run.py
- outreach_draft_factory_dry_run.py, proposal_pack_dry_run.py
- founder_daily_command_dry_run.py, content_factory_dry_run.py
- weekly_gtm_review_dry_run.py, launch_bundle_validate.py, launch_conflict_scan.py

## Test Suite: tests/launch/ — 319 tests, 319 passing
- test_icp_scorer.py, test_vertical_scorer.py, test_trust_preflight.py
- test_outreach_factory.py, test_proposal_engine.py, test_pipeline_tracker.py

## Sample Data: data/launch/
- target_accounts/sample_accounts.json — 5 realistic Saudi accounts
- pipeline/sample_pipeline.json — 3 deals in different stages
- outreach_drafts/sample_drafts.json — 2 approved LinkedIn/email drafts
- proposals/sample_proposal.json — full Arabic proposal for WhatsApp OS
- daily_commands/sample_daily_command.json — sample daily brief

## Makefile
- 14 new launch OS targets: launch-validate, launch-vertical-score, launch-icp-score,
  launch-trust-preflight, launch-outreach-drafts, launch-proposal, launch-founder-command,
  launch-weekly-review, launch-content, launch-pipeline, launch-all-dry-runs, test-launch

## Patches
- patches/MAKEFILE_OPTIONAL_LAUNCH_TARGETS.patch (optional, bundled reference)
- patches/WEB_OPTIONAL_LAUNCH_COMMAND_ROOM.patch
- patches/API_OPTIONAL_LAUNCH_ENDPOINTS.patch
